title: Command Cockpit Mobile Quest Boss Bar
summary: Compressed the mobile Command Cockpit Overview current-run tile into a live quest boss bar with a smaller portrait, compact progress meter, hidden long summary copy, tighter signal cells, and an animated runner scan.
proof: Added a scoped mobile boss-bar marker and regression test for the Command Cockpit Overview quest module.
Kept the same quest data and actions while reducing the live module height from a tall report block to a compact objective panel.
Verified the live 390x760 cockpit: quest panel height 152px, hero height 56px, long copy hidden, signal cells compressed, and the stage remains within the first phone viewport.
